text.title: AI-Assisted Multi-Squad Quarter Retro Synthesis Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report claims '40% lead-time improvement' that doesn't match snapshot.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent inferred trend from chat rather than reading snapshot.
antipattern.fix: Numbers come from snapshot CSV only; validate-quarter-retro-synthesis.py diffs report DORA section against snapshot.

antipattern.symptom: Chat export with customer name flows into LLM provider.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory local redaction pass; reject the run if redaction step skipped.

antipattern.symptom: Report singles out one squad; team morale collapses.
antipattern.root-cause: Severity scoring biased toward one squad's incidents.
antipattern.fix: Normalise scoring per-squad headcount; reviewer reads for tone before publication.

antipattern.symptom: Report runs to 30 pages and is unread.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent tried to cover all themes.
antipattern.fix: Cap main report to 2 pages + appendix for detail; top-K only.
